statement: In every magma, Equation 2034 (`x = (y * (z * w)) * (u * v)`) implies Equation 2417 (`x = (y * (z * (w * x))) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0646
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u v : G, x = (op (op y (op z w)) (op u v))) :
    ∀ x y z w u v : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op w x))) z)
